title: vitex agnus-castus f. latifolia
intro: Vitex agnus-castus f. latifolia, a variety of the chasteberry plant, is a flowering shrub native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hormonal balancing effects. The health benefits of Vitex agnus-castus f. latifolia include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and stress, as well as support for reproductive health and hormone regulation. Vitex agnus-castus f. latifolia can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and balance.
